subject: Introducing NYT Now from The New York Times. Try it today!
body:
Introducing NYT Now from The New York Times:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTQSWnB81HXJB85QqcAAwENc1C/sub1

-----------------------------------------------------------------

View in browser:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTQSWnB81HXJB85QqcAAwENc1C/viwb?t_params=EMAIL%3Djeeproject%2540yahoo.com%26REGI_ID%3D47275261

-----------------------------------------------------------------

-- THE NEW YORK TIMES --

NOW THERE'S AN EASIER WAY
TO STAY UP TO THE MINUTE.

NYT Now from The New York Times

Stories at the speed of life.

-----------------------------------------------------------------

INTRODUCING NYT NOW.

JUST 99 CENTS FOR 8 WEEKS.

What you need to know, when you need to know it. NYT Now 
features editors' selections from the day's top stories -- in 
a new app for your iPhone(R) and on NYTimes.com. Experience it 
now and see how it can positively impact your next conversation. 
Or make the most of the minutes in between.

Here's what the NYT Now app delivers: 

-- Times top stories selected by our editors

-- A handpicked feed of stories from other sources

-- Article summaries to get you caught up quickly

-- A briefing each morning giving you a look at the day ahead

Plus, get unlimited access to NYT Now stories on NYTimes.com

Try it now:
http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTQSWnB81HXJB85QqcAAwENc1C/sub2

NYT Now

Stories at the speed of life.

>From The New York Times

-----------------------------------------------------------------

You received this e-mail because you are a registered
user of The New York Times. 

Promotional offers valid for new subscriptions only. 
New York Times subscriptions are sold separately from e-reader 
editions, Premium Crosswords and The New York Times Crosswords 
apps. Smartphone and tablet apps are not supported on all devices. 
If the subscription is canceled, refunds and termination of 
access will follow the Terms of Sale policy. Other restrictions 
and taxes may apply.

Apple, the Apple logo, and iPhone are trademarks of Apple Inc., 
registered in the U.S. and other countries.

To ensure delivery of e-mails from The New York Times, please
add nytimes@e.newyorktimesinfo.com to your address book.

http://e.newyorktimesinfo.com/a/tBTQSWnB81HXJB85QqcAAwENc1C/nyt

What you need to know, when you need to know it. NYT Now features editors’ selections from the day’s top stories — in a new app for your iPhone® and on NYTimes.com. Experience it now and see how it can positively impact your next conversation. Or make the most of the minutes in between.

•  Times top stories selected by our editors
•  A handpicked feed of stories from other sources
•  Article summaries to get you caught up quickly
•  A briefing each morning giving you a look at the day ahead

Plus, get unlimited access to NYT Now stories
on NYTimes.com
